The nervous strain of a holiday
rush, which often keeps up for Ia
hours a day for a week before
Christmas. is almost unbearable.


For these reasons and many 9th
ers the Consumers league, which
Is composed of representatives or
most of the women's clubs OF
America, is asking its members to
do all in their power to help the
condition of these workers who
must bear the burden Of the holi-
day rush.
